title: Export
description: Export {count} invoices matching your current filters.
noData: No data to export. Please adjust your filters.
largeDataset: Large dataset ({count} records). Export may take a while.

csv.label: CSV (.csv)
csv.description: Comma-separated values, suitable for data import.

xlsx.label: Excel (.xlsx)
xlsx.description: Excel spreadsheet format, suitable for general use.

options.includeItemsDesc: Each invoice item will be exported as a separate row.
options.includeItemsMandatory: Line items are always included for accounting formats.

accountingTooltip: Accounting formats are designed for direct import into accounting software.
accountingWarning: Accounting formats always include line items and are formatted for direct import.

error.title: Export Failed
error.description: An error occurred while exporting. Please try again.

formatsError.title: Format Loading Error
formatsError.description: Could not load export formats. Using default formats.
